message:
feat(core): S3-FIFO scan-resistant cache (bd-l6yba.1)

Three-queue eviction policy (small/main/ghost) that resists one-hit-wonder
scan patterns while being simpler and faster than LRU. 20 unit tests covering
eviction, promotion, ghost readmission, scan resistance, and statistics.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
